form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up in the past. Resuming 9th of 11 at this track on March 1 over 1200m, 8 len behind Pakistan Legacy with 61kg at $10. Second run from a spell sat on the speed throughout before fading 7th of 12 at Happy Valley on March 18 over 1200m, 4 len behind Aurio with 60.5kg at $10. Looks safely held.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after a year second last of 10 at this track on March 22 over 1200m, 4 len behind Circuit Champion carrying 58kg at $19. Previously second-up ran last of 8 at Hastings in the LR Colin Meads Trophy on September 7 2024 over 1200m, 9 len behind Poetic Champion with 57kg at $35.40. Likely to find this out of reach.

form.formComment: Since last run he has trialed at Conghua over 1200m on 27/3/2026; Last run favourite; won by a nose at this track March 15 over 1400m defeating Mighty Masts carrying 56kg at $3. Run before ninth of 14 at this track February 19 over 1200m, 4.5 len behind Jubilant Winner with 56kg at $4.50. Very smart and looks hard to beat again.
